message:
feat(agentdb): implement ADR-003 RVF native format backend integration

Implements all 10 phases of RVF (RuVector Format) backend integration:

- Phase 1: RvfBackend.ts with sync-to-async bridge, security validation,
  performance tracking, COW branching, and witness chains
- Phase 2: VectorBackendAsync interface extending VectorBackend with
  flush(), insertAsync(), searchAsync(), removeAsync()
- Phase 3: factory.ts updated with RVF detection and creation, fallback
  chain: ruvector -> rvf -> hnswlib
- Phase 4: detector.ts with RvfAvailability, checkRvf(), and RVF feature
  flags (lineage, branching)
- Phase 5: rvf.ts CLI command with status/compact/derive/segments/detect
  subcommands
- Phase 6: init.ts extended with --backend rvf and --rvf-path options
- Phase 7: migrate.ts with --to rvf export support
- Phase 8: doctor.ts with RVF backend detection and store health checks
- Phase 9: agentdb-cli.ts registration of rvf command and arg parsing
- Phase 10: ESLint cleanup (0 warnings), TypeScript compilation (0 errors)

Security: Path traversal prevention, bounded batch sizes (10K max),
bounded pending queue (50K max), dimension validation (4096 max)

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
